redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: injection_plan injects publicRelease=false and tddContract; omits releaseEvidencePlan keys

redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: public plan injection, harness filter, domain mismatch, and main() halt payload tests added before implementation
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: All injection contract unit + main() payload tests pass
redGreenRefactorEvidence.refactorEvidence: In-process main() harness with redirect_stdout; reused META-1 cache fixtures

implementationSummary: Extended meta_prepare_executor injection_plan to inject publicRelease, tddContract, and full releaseEvidencePlan (+ releaseEvidencePlanId) when publicRelease is true; filter harnessUtility skills to Executor-phase only; halt on executor_domain_alignment mismatch; enrich failed-gate halt payload with missingFields. Added focused unit tests for all META-2 acceptance paths. Existing agent-runtime docs already forbid Executor start without readyForExecutor — no doc bypass found.
assumptions: META-1 public_release_* gates remain authoritative for plan validity before unlock
Domain mismatch is detected by comparing injectionPlan.executorDomain to child.issueLoadProfile.executorDomain after plan construction
risks: META-3/4 CI validators (#515/#516) still required to enforce tddContract evidence at merge time
